creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #18)

Thank you, I will look over the patch and approve today if all looks well.

I have some big cleanup to do on cnagios itself to allow it to consume multiple nagios/icinga versions at runtime, but FLAVORS side-steps that nicely and lowers the pressure to do that.

Apologies again for the timeout, I'm hoping I'm well enough to start contributing again but will focus on at minimum not being a roadblock.
